mapper.select: SELECT a.id as qrcodeId,a.merchant_id,a.agent_id,a.nick_name,a.account_number,a.uid,a.account_remark,c.balance, a.min_amount as qrcodeMinAmount,a.max_amount as qrcodeMaxAmount,a.qrcode_type,a.qrcode_value,a.qrcode_url,a.day_limit,a.count_limit, b.merchant_overtime,b.channel_rate as merchantRate,b.min_amount as merchantMinAmount, b.max_amount as merchantMaxAmount,c.merchant_name, f.user_id as shopId,f.user_name as shopName,f.min_amount as shopMinAmount, f.max_amount as shopMaxAmount,f.sign_secret, g.channel_rate as shopRate,h.id as channelId,h.channel_code,h.channel_name,cac.overtime,cac.id as agentChannelId,ca.user_name as agentName, cac.over_amount,cac.over_amount_rate,cac.locked_code,cac.set_amount,cac.over_amount_value,ifnull(b.weight,c.weight) as weight, b.id as merchantChannelId,cac.cost_rate as agentRate, cac.qrcode_model as qrcodeModel,c.min_amount as minMerchantGetAmount,c.order_remind as orderRemind, b.merchant_rate_one as merchantRateOne,b.merchant_rate_two as merchantRateTwo,b.merchant_rate_three as merchantRateThree, b.merchant_rate_four as merchantRateFour, b.merchant_rate_five as merchantRateFive,ca.weight_type, k.baseDeposit as baseDeposit FROM ct_merchant_qrcode a JOIN ct_merchant_channel b on a.merchant_channel_id = b.id and a.merchant_id = b.merchant_id JOIN ct_merchant c on a.merchant_id = c.user_id JOIN ct_shop_merchant_relation d on d.merchant_id = c.user_id JOIN ct_shop f on d.shop_id = f.user_id JOIN ct_shop_base_channel g on f.user_id = g.shop_id and g.channel_id = b.channel_id JOIN ct_channel h on g.channel_id = h.id JOIN ct_agent ca on a.agent_id = ca.user_id JOIN ct_agent_channel cac on a.agent_id = cac.agent_id AND cac.channel_id = h.id JOIN (SELECT max(base_deposit) as baseDeposit,merchant_id FROM ct_merchant_channel k where k.`status` = 0 GROUP BY merchant_id) k ON k.merchant_id = a.merchant_id WHERE a.`status` = 0 AND a.del_flag = 0 AND b.`status` = 0 AND c.del_flag = 0 AND c.`status` = 0 AND d.`status` = 0 AND f.`status` = 0 AND f.del_flag = 0 AND g.`status` = 0 AND h.`status` = 0 AND h.del_flag = 0 AND c.work_status = 0 AND c.order_permission = 0 AND ca.`status` = 0 AND cac.`status` = 0 And b.agent_contrl = 0 ORDER BY a.agent_id,a.merchant_id,a.id

select a.shop_order_no as clientOrderNo,a.trade_no as orderNo, SUBSTRING_INDEX(b.telegram_group, '/', 1) AS ptChatId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.telegram_group, '/', 1) AS shChatId from ct_in_order a left join ct_merchant b on a.merchant_id=b.user_id left join ct_in_order_detail c on a.id=c.order_id left join ct_shop d on c.shop_id=d.user_id
and a.shop_order_no=#{dto.clientOrderNo}
